get.description: Pytest failed to collect any tests due to a FileNotFoundError: '/var/tmp/.../api.json' was missing, causing an error in test_employees_id_get.py at module load. No tests were executed.

post.description:
Summary:

All 4 tests in test_employees_post.py failed.  
- The first three tests (success, various, boundary_cases) failed due to a RuntimeError: the test data file employees.json exists but is not a JSON object as required.
- The fourth test (invalid_content_type) failed because the API returned status code 201, instead of the expected 400 or 415, when an invalid Content-Type header was sent.
- No tests passed.

get.description: No tests were run due to a single collection error. The test file `test_employees_get.py` failed to execute because the required API spec file `api.json` was missing, resulting in a `FileNotFoundError`.
